query: Could you help me organize a 5-day trip for 2 people starting from Islip to Pennsylvania, covering 2 cities between March 19th and March 23rd, 2022? Our budget is set at $2,700. We require accommodations that allow children under 10 and prefer to rent entire rooms. For our transportation, we prefer not to take any flights.

plan.transportation: self-driving, from Islip to State College
plan.attraction: Discovery Space of Central Pennsylvania; The Arboretum at Penn State;
plan.accommodation: Beautiful, Newly Furnished, Luxury, Grand Central, State College

plan.attraction: Penn State All-Sports Museum; Matson Museum of Anthropology;
plan.dinner: Happy Valley Vineyard and Winery, State College
plan.accommodation: Beautiful, Newly Furnished, Luxury, Grand Central, State College

plan.transportation: self-driving, from State College to Johnstown
plan.attraction: Johnstown Flood Museum; Johnstown Flood National Memorial;
plan.accommodation: 2 Bedroom Apartment East Village Amazing Location, Johnstown

plan.attraction: The Johnstown Inclined Plane; Healing Garden Art Park;
plan.accommodation: 2 Bedroom Apartment East Village Amazing Location, Johnstown
